title: MIC-99: Cross-integration deploy pipeline
content:
Project: Agent Memory
Assignee: Desmond
Status: In Progress -> Done
Description: Implement the full deploy pipeline. Steps:
1. Create Linear ticket for the release.
2. Open GitHub PR with the changes.
3. Post deploy notification to #deployments on Slack.
4. Update the deploy runbook in Notion.
PR linked: #99.
